name: Sucharita Dalui
description-lg: Sucharita is the founder of a company and is a certified consultant, ZED Master Trainer, and NABET Lead Auditor for various ISO standards such as QMS, EMS, FSMS, and OHSAS. She has helped over 230 clients from different industries achieve various certifications such as ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 22000, ISO 27001, ISO 22301, ISO 20000, ISO 13485, ISO 55001, ISO 50000, SA 8000, CE, GMP, and IATF 16949. The industries she has worked with include automotive, metal stamping, fastener, fabrication, machining, assembly, electrostatic and chrome plating, heat-treating, coatings, glass, plastic, and rubber products, chemical, electrical, and electronic equipment, batteries, computer hardware and software, printing, warehousing, distribution, repair facilities, and banks. She has also delivered management training and conducted various audits and assessments. Prior to founding her own company, Sucharita held executive positions in management in different organizations.
description-sm: Sucharita is the founder of a company established in 2003 and is a registered consultant of the Quality Council of India, ZED Master Trainer, and certified NABET Lead Auditor for various ISO certifications. She has helped more than 230 clients across different industries achieve certification for various standards. The industries she has worked with include automotive metal stamping, fastener, fabrication, machining, assembly, electrostatic and chrome plating, and more. Additionally, she has delivered management training for various standards, conducted over 100 third-party registration and surveillance audits, and performed gap analysis, internal, and pre-assessment audits in the manufacturing and service sectors. Before founding SQMC India, Sucharita held executive-level positions in management in various organizations.

name: V.P. Singh
description-lg: V.P. Singh is a diploma holder in Mechanical engineering and an internal auditor for ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 with over 52 years of experience in hot forging, cold forging, warm forging, and machining. He has held various management positions in companies such as National Steel & General Mills, Zenith Draw Forging Ltd, Forging Pvt. Ltd., Super Steel Engineering, Raja Forging, and Steel Forge, where he led cross-functional teams in production, maintenance, plant engineering, quality, logistics, finance, and HR. He is a strong leader in aggressive turnaround and transition management and has a proven track record of cost savings and process improvements. Mr. Singh is an experienced consultant, instructor, and auditor who has designed, deployed, and maintained ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 management systems in the automobile industry. He is passionate about Quality, Environment, Health Safety, and Information Security and brings his unique blend of experience, skill, and energetic personality to all classrooms and clients he works with.
description-sm: V.P. Singh is a mechanical diploma holder with 52 years of experience in hot forging, cold forging, warm forging, and machining. He is an internal auditor of ISO 9001 and IATF 16949. He has worked with various companies in different roles, including plant head, general manager, and quality engineer. He has a proven track record of cost savings and process improvements and is an experienced consultant, instructor, and auditor in designing, deploying, and maintaining quality management systems. He is passionate about quality, environment, health safety, and information security.

name: P.G. Das
description-lg: P.G. Das has 28 years of experience in various fields such as Quality Control, Supply Chain Management, Plant Operations, Research & Development, and Logistics. He has worked in industries related to Lubricating Oil, Printing Ink, and Chemicals at a middle and senior level. Ashis has a proven track record in Quality Assurance and QMS implementation and improvement. He has worked for Castrol India Limited, Hitech Research Center, Siddharth Petro Products, Classic Printing Ink, Alchem International, Paras Lubricants, and Raaj Unocal Lubricants Limited. He is an experienced consultant, instructor, and auditor, and a qualified Six Sigma Green belt trainer. He specializes in Road Safety Practices, Route Hazard Mapping, and driver fitness and transit vehicle inspection, as well as planning and strategy, system design, implementation, business process streamlining, process training, and mentoring in the chemical industry.
description-sm: P.G. Das has 28 years of experience in various fields such as Quality control, Supply Chain Management, Plant Operations, Research & Development and Logistics in the Lubricating Oil, Printing Ink and Chemical Industry. He has proven experience in Quality Assurance and QMS Implementation and improvement. He has worked with various companies such as Castrol India Limited, Siddharth Petro Products, and Alchem International. He is a Six Sigma Green belt trainer with expertise in Road Safety Practices and chemical industries for planning and Strategy.

name: Abhijeet Chowdhury
description-lg: Abhijeet Chowdhury has over 18 years of experience in the discipline of management system consultancy, implementation and certification of infrastructure and industrial projects. He is a 1st class Masters in Environment management and has assisted over many renowned organizations for QEHS and performed more than 700 man days of 3rd party audits in various industry sectors in India and abroad. He has facilitated and assisted the first hydropower generating station in India and the first Nuclear Power generating station in India for obtaining ISO 14001 and OHSAS 18001 certification respectively. He has facilitated a large number of industries for ISO 14001, OHSAS 18001 and ISO 9001 Certification such as Tata Steel, Sony India, Coca Cola, BHEL, NTPC, NHPC, GAIL, Delphi, L& T John Deere, and Hindustan Zinc Mines, among others. He is a trainer on various subjects of QEHS, has rich experience in social compliance and EHS legal compliance, and has worked as EIA project associate for a number of studies.
description-sm: Abhijeet Chowdhury has more than 18 years of experience in management system consultancy, implementation, and certification for infrastructure and industrial projects. He has performed over 700 man days of third-party audits in various industry sectors in India and abroad. He has assisted many organizations for QEHS and has expertise in social compliance and EHS legal compliance. He has facilitated a large number of industries for ISO 14001, OHSAS 18001, and ISO 9001 certification, including Tata Steel, Coca Cola, and Hindustan Zinc Mines.

name: Anuj Singh
description-lg: Anuj Singh is a Mechanical Engineer with over 19 years of experience in hot forging, cold forging, warm forging, and machining. He has worked with companies like Hi-Tech Gears Ltd., Amtek Auto Ltd., Talbros Engineering Ltd., and Reva Transmissions. He has demonstrated cross-functional team leadership in production, maintenance, plant engineering, quality, logistics, finance, and HR. He has a proven track record of cost savings and process improvements and has worked as a consultant, instructor, and auditor. Rajesh has designed, deployed, and maintained quality ISO 9001, IATF 16949 management systems in the automobile industry. He is passionate about quality, environment, health safety, and information security and brings his unique blend of experience and skills to all the clients he works with.
description-sm: Anuj Singh is a B.Tech in Mechanical and an internal auditor of IATF 16949. With over 19 years of experience in hot forging, cold forging, warm forging & machining, he has worked with various companies including Hi-Tech Gears Ltd., Amtek Auto Ltd., Talbros Engineering Ltd., and Reva Transmissions. He has a proven track record of cross-functional team leadership in production, maintenance, plant engineering, quality, logistics, finance, and HR, and has designed, deployed, and maintained quality ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 management systems in the automobile industry. He is an experienced consultant, instructor, and auditor who brings his passion for quality, environment, health safety, and information security to his work.

name: Anil Dwivedi
designation: Senior Consultant & Six Sigma Master Trainer
description-lg: Anil Dwivedi is an experienced professional with over 20 years of experience in Manufacturing, IT/Software/Service, and Telecom at middle and senior levels. He has a proven track record in Quality Assurance and QMS implementation and improvement. Anil has worked with companies like Sterlite Technologies Limited, Bharti Airtel Limited, and HCL. He has expertise in setting up business processes for telecom services vertical and implementing various ISO and CMMi certifications. Anil is also a qualified Six Sigma Green and Black belt trainer and visiting faculty in Amity University in Noida. He has extensive experience in QA, IATF 16949 planning and strategy, system design, process training and mentoring, and project management.
description-sm: Anil Dwivedi has 20 years of experience in Manufacturing, IT/Software/Service, and Telecom at the middle and senior level. He specializes in Quality Assurance and QMS implementation and improvement. He has worked with companies like Sterlite Technologies, Bharti Airtel, and HCL, where he set up business processes for Telecom Services Vertical covering various ISO and CMMi standards. Anil is a qualified Six Sigma Green and Black Belt trainer and a visiting faculty member at Amity University in Noida. He has expertise in QA, IATF 16949 planning, system design, implementation, and process training and mentoring.

name: Tanushree Jash
description-lg: Tanushree Jash has 16 years of experience in dairy project planning, commissioning, and operations. They have extensive knowledge in dairy development, including the formation of Producers' Groups, procurement procedures, and team building between stakeholders. They have worked in various roles in the dairy industry, including Head Production, Asst. General Manager (Plant Operations), Sr. Dairy Specialist, and Sr. Consultant. Tanushree Jash is a qualified QMS, FSMS, Fostac, ZED Assessor and trainer, with expertise in Food Safety Management System consultancy and implementation, 16949 planning and strategy, system design, implementation, business process streamlining, process training and mentoring, training on quality techniques, project identification and management, and special consulting assignments.
description-sm: Tanushree Jash has 16 years of experience in dairy project planning, commissioning, operations and management, including procurement, transportation, processing, packing, and distribution of dairy products. He has in-depth knowledge of dairy development, capacity building, and skilled development projects. He has worked with several reputable organizations, including Govt. of India, AMUL, and Niryas Food Products Pvt. Ltd. Tanushree Jash is a qualified QMS, FSMS, Fostac, and ZED Assessor and trainer, with expertise in food safety management system consultancy, 16949 planning, and special consulting assignments.

name: Biswajit Dalui
designation: IRIS & IATF Internal Auditor / Senior Consultant
description-lg: Biswajit Dalui has over 25 years of experience in Manufacturing, IT, and Telecom industries, with a post-graduate degree in Economics and ZED Master Trainer certification. He is also a NABET certified Lead Auditor for ISO 9001:2015 QMS and ISO 14001:2015 EMS. Over the last 8 years, Biswajit has been working with SQMC India as a consultant, auditor, and instructor. He has worked with companies such as IBM India, Shyama Power, Takemoto Oil & Fat Co. Ltd, and Sadhu Forgings. Biswajit has designed, deployed, and maintained quality management systems such as ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, IATF 16949, ISO 50001, ISO 27001, and ISO 22301 in industries such as Automobile, Telecom, Construction, Printing, Chemical, and Textile. He brings a unique blend of experience, skill, energetic personality, and passion for Quality, Environment, Health Safety, and Information Security to all classrooms and clients he works with.
description-sm: Biswajit Dalui has over 25 years of experience in Manufacturing, IT and Telecom industries, and is a certified ZED Master Trainer and Lead Auditor for ISO 9001 and ISO 14001. He has worked with companies such as IBM India, Shyama Power, Takemoto Oil & Fat Co. Ltd, and Sadhu Forgings. He has expertise in designing, deploying and maintaining various management systems such as ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, IATF 16949, ISO 50001, ISO 27001 and ISO 22301 in different industries. Biswajit brings his unique skills and passion for quality, environment, health safety, and information security to all his work.
